nodes.name: Catamenia
nodes.summary: Catamenia（Catamenia）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联3种鸟类，如Band-tailed seedeater、Plain-colored seedeater、Paramo seedeater。

nodes.name: Plain-colored seedeater
nodes.summary: Plain-colored seedeater（Catamenia inornata）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Plain-colored seedeater。

nodes.name: Plain-colored seedeater
nodes.summary: The plain-colored seedeater (Catamenia inornata) is a species of bird in the family Thraupidae. It is found in Argentina, Bolivia, Chile, Colombia, Ecuador, Peru, and Venezuela. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist montane forests, subtropical or tropical high-altitude shrubland, and subtropical or tropical high-altitude grassland. Gallery References
